tokens.text: You have all dreamed of peace…
Yet it was nothing more than an illusion…
...that is about to shatter!
Look at how you struggle
So pathetic
So foolish
Not even death can bring you comfort
We will be your salvation
Don’t resist your greatest desires
Embrace your new Master
Well, should go back before an elf puts an arrow through my neck…
I wish I could just have some rest and enjoy the view…
Hey, shiny, I wouldn’t mind joining you up there!
H-haah. What is this…? What is this voice…?
Nnnn-RRAAAAGHHH! AAAAAAHHHH!!
…Someone is here!
Show yourself!
Medusae! Douse the flames!
What?! How?!
Watch out —
We can’t win if we look at them! Kill the lights!
I can’t! Fires refuse to go out! Something’s wrong with our torches!
No…
It’s not just our torches…
Something’s very wrong with Garner Hills!
We did not have to fight.
You just had to open the gate for us.
But you were stubborn, believing your small city could withstand His power.
And look at you now…
…still thinking you can just run away from His eyes.
But He sees everything.
Those, who are trying to escape.
And those, who already left, thinking they are unreachable.
Well… you called for us, and we came.
I… I called for salvation. Not for you.
And yet, we saved you. Didn’t we?
…That much is true. But I never asked you to bring me here.
I… Let me go. I want to… leave.
Do you, though? And how will you leave… while your legs can not carry you?
Why not to stay with us… for a while?
…I suppose I could.
It is ironic that none of the “big wigs” see you as the real threat
when it‘s clear you are the greatest force Jadame has seen in centuries.
Is that why you reach out to us now?
To avoid danger?
I'd call it mutual gain.
You seem resourceful enough, if you even found a way to use the crystals.
Perhaps… you may prove useful.
I expect the same from you — and your Master.
A bold claim, Lord Galthran.
But you do not yet grasp what you are dealing with.
Now, listen. Not with your ears — but with your heart and mind.
This feeling... as if the crystal itself is calling to me. What trickery is this?
The Song speaks to you.
It tells you far more than mere words can — of what you may achieve when our Plan for a New World comes to fruition.
It... certainly sounds alluring. A direct path to glory — to enlightenment.
Could it be that simple?
Not only will you survive — but you will become part of something greater than anything you have ever known.
The Song… yes, I hear it now. It is clear…
I know what must be done.
